dc_description: A roadside scene photographed from a low, vehicle-mounted perspective, likely from a scooter or motorcycle. The foreground contains a blurred handlebar and mirror, while the right side shows a large blue circular traffic sign with a white directional arrow. Above it is a blue place-name sign reading "CELLENO." A two-lane road extends into the distance with several cars traveling in both directions. Trees line the left side of the road, and the sky is bright with scattered clouds.
novel_visual_observations: The town sign is partially cropped at the top-right edge but remains readable as "CELLENO." The image has visible film-like grain and strong contrast between the shaded road/tree area and the bright sky.
rich_context: Via Cassia, Paoletti, Zepponami, Montefiascone, Viterbo, Lazio, 01027, Italia
